stemHtml: The rigidity of a gyro is improved by…

options.a: increasing RPM and concentrating the mass on the periphery of the rotor.
options.b: decreasing RPM and concentrating the mass at the hub of the rotor.
options.c: increasing RPM and concentrating the mass at the hub of the rotor.
options.d: decreasing RPM and concentrating the mass on the periphery of the rotor.
